Michael Bracamontes, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak, (415-835-6777), for Rebecca Janecek, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: DEFENDANTs MIKE TAM and PING MAY's Motion To Quash The Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Records To Kaiser Hospital - San Francisco is moot in light of ruling on the companion motion. As Defendant is ordered to appear at deposition, there is no need for the medical records. Sanctions granted against defendants and her counsel in the amount of $2,335 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant and her counsel refused to appear at deposition asserting inability to testify and refused to cooperative with less intrusive means of discovery designed to corroborate defendant's claim of inability to testify.
